rationale: Distribution fix for MMBench. Verified the student floors on MMBench because it trains on COCO (POPE's distribution) while MMBench is ~70% science/knowledge/reasoning/OCR — and the rehearsal student scores 59/100 on in-distribution COCO MCQ (chance 25%) yet floors MMBench, so it CAN do MCQ format; the gap is DATA DISTRIBUTION, not format/capacity. ScienceQA is the closest public match to MMBench's dominant distribution and is natively MCQ. Pilot: distill on scienceqa_mcq (2500 gold MCQ) as primary, with qa_balanced_5k grounding replayed at frac 0.3 to test whether MMBench lifts off the 0.50 floor WHILE retaining POPE. Tests the system's own meta-lesson: match training data to the eval distribution.
